title: Assertion failure in ivl_signal_nex with multi-dimensional uwire input port array
body:
Compilation of the following SystemVerilog module throws an error:
```
module sub(input uwire data [1:0]);  
endmodule
```
Command:
`iverilog -g2012 test.sv`

Error output:
```
ivl: t-dll-api.cc:2469: ivl_nexus_s* ivl_signal_nex(ivl_signal_t, unsigned int): Assertion `net->type_ == IVL_SIT_REG' failed.
Aborted (core dumped)
```
Expected behavior:
Successful compilation with warning about unconnected input port, or explicit error message if uwire array ports require connection.
code_blocks:
ivl: t-dll-api.cc:2469: ivl_nexus_s* ivl_signal_nex(ivl_signal_t, unsigned int): Assertion `net->type_ == IVL_SIT_REG' failed.
Aborted (core dumped)
